gazab.name: G'azab
gazab.instructions: Speak with intense anger, raised voice, sharp and forceful delivery, strong emphasis on angry words, quick and aggressive pace

qaygu.name: Qayg'u
qaygu.instructions: Speak with deep sadness, slow and deliberate pace, somber tone, quiet voice, emotional and melancholic delivery

yiglash.name: Yig'lash
yiglash.instructions: Speak while crying, voice cracking, emotional sobbing between words, tearful and trembling delivery, slow pace

qorquv.name: Qo'rquv
qorquv.instructions: Speak with fear, trembling voice, quick and breathless delivery, shaky and terrified tone, panicked pace

hayrat.name: Hayrat
hayrat.instructions: Speak with surprise and amazement, elevated pitch, enthusiastic delivery, expressive and shocked tone

xursandchilik.name: Xursandchilik
xursandchilik.instructions: Speak with happiness and joy, bright and cheerful tone, energetic delivery, warm and positive voice

kulish.name: Kulish
kulish.instructions: Speak with laughter, playful tone, giggling between words, light and humorous delivery

sovuqqonlik.name: Sovuqqonlik
sovuqqonlik.instructions: Speak with coldness and detachment, calm and steady tone, slow and even pace, unemotional delivery

qahramonona.name: Qahramonona nutq
qahramonona.instructions: Speak heroically, powerful and confident tone, strong and clear delivery, inspiring and epic voice, steady and commanding pace

yovuz_qahramon.name: Yovuz qahramon nutqi
yovuz_qahramon.instructions: Speak villainously, dark and menacing tone, sinister delivery, slow and deliberate pace with evil intent
